title: Move roster to right side of congress UI

log.context: Move roster to right side of congress UI

Done. Here's a summary of what changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**CSS** (line 63-68): Grid changed from `240px 1fr` to `240px 1fr 240px`.

**Mobile media query** (line 680-687): Added `sidebar-right { order: 3; border-left: none; border-top: ... }` so it stacks below the arena on small screens.

**HTML structure** (lines 1197-1282):
- Left `<aside class="sidebar sidebar-left">` now contains only the Sessions list. The session body gets `flex: 1 1 auto` so it fills the full pane...(truncated)
